tools.name: browser_create_page_agent
tools.description: Create a page-scoped AI agent bound to the active or specified tab.

goal.description: The goal this page agent should work toward.

name.description: Optional label for the page agent.

tabId.description: Optional tab to bind before creating the page agent.

environment.description: Optional environment override for this call.

tools.name: browser_list_page_agents
tools.description: List page-scoped AI agents.

tools.name: browser_get_page_agent
tools.description: Get one page-scoped AI agent by id.

tools.name: browser_run_page_agent_step
tools.description: Run one controlled observation step for a page-scoped AI agent.

tools.name: browser_run_page_agent_loop
tools.description: Run a controlled multi-step loop for a page-scoped AI agent.

tools.name: browser_apply_page_agent_proposal
tools.description: Apply the last proposed next action for a page-scoped AI agent.

tools.name: browser_remove_page_agent
tools.description: Remove one page-scoped AI agent by id.

tools.name: browser_navigate
tools.description: Navigate current tab to URL.

environment.description: Temporarily target a named browser environment for this call only.

tools.name: browser_reload
tools.description: Reload current tab.

tools.name: browser_go_back
tools.description: Go back in tab history.

tools.name: browser_go_forward
tools.description: Go forward in tab history.

tools.name: browser_aria_snapshot
tools.description: Return accessibility-oriented snapshot with refs.

tools.name: browser_screenshot
tools.description: Take page screenshot.

tools.name: browser_get_text
tools.description: Extract readable text from page or selector.

environment.description: Temporarily target a named browser environment for this call only.

tools.name: browser_evaluate
tools.description: Evaluate JavaScript in page context.

tools.name: browser_click
tools.description: Click element by selector.

tools.name: browser_click_by_ref
tools.description: Click element by aria snapshot ref.

tools.name: browser_type
tools.description: Type text into element by selector.

tools.name: browser_type_by_ref
tools.description: Type text into element by aria snapshot ref.

tools.name: browser_set_input_value
tools.description: Set input value and dispatch input/change/blur events.

tools.name: browser_set_input_value_by_ref
tools.description: Set input value by aria ref and dispatch input/change/blur events.

tools.name: browser_find_and_click_text
tools.description: Find visible text and click matching element.

tools.name: browser_press
tools.description: Press keyboard key.

tools.name: browser_scroll
tools.description: Scroll page or element.

tools.name: browser_wait
tools.description: Wait fixed milliseconds.

tools.name: browser_wait_for_selector
tools.description: Wait for selector state.

tools.name: browser_wait_for_text
tools.description: Wait for text to appear.

tools.name: browser_wait_for_load
tools.description: Wait for page load state.

tools.name: browser_list_tabs
tools.description: List open tabs.

environment.description: Temporarily target a named browser environment for this call only.

tools.name: browser_new_tab
tools.description: Create a new tab and optionally navigate.

environment.description: Temporarily target a named browser environment for this call only.

tools.name: browser_switch_tab
tools.description: Switch active tab by id or index.

environment.description: Temporarily target a named browser environment for this call only.

tools.name: browser_close_tab
tools.description: Close tab by id or close current tab when omitted.

environment.description: Temporarily target a named browser environment for this call only.

tools.name: browser_wait_for_url
tools.description: Wait for URL pattern to match current tab URL.

tools.name: browser_wait_for_function
tools.description: Wait until JavaScript function or expression evaluates truthy.

tools.name: browser_connect_environment
tools.description: Connect a running Chrome instance as a named environment.

cdp_endpoint.description: Chrome remote debugging endpoint such as 'localhost:9222' or 'ws://...'

set_active.description: Whether to activate the environment immediately.

tools.name: browser_launch_environment
tools.description: Launch a local Chrome or Chromium instance and register it as an MCP environment.

name.description: Optional environment name. When omitted, a unique local-* name is assigned automatically.

executable_path.description: Optional browser executable path. When omitted, brosdk-mcp will try common Chrome/Chromium locations.

initial_url.description: Optional startup URL. Defaults to about:blank.

headless.description: Whether to launch the browser in headless mode.

set_active.description: Whether to activate the environment immediately.

tools.name: browser_list_environments
tools.description: List available browser environments and their connection state.

tools.name: browser_switch_environment
tools.description: Switch to an existing environment, or connect it when cdp_endpoint is provided.

cdp_endpoint.description: Chrome remote debugging endpoint used when creating the environment on demand.

tools.name: browser_close_environment
tools.description: Close a named MCP environment and release its browser connection state.
